headline: Jan Paul — update
body: 🚨 Tottenham agree deal to sign Jan Paul van Hecke from Brighton, here we go! 💣 New defender wanted by De Zerbi joining on £52m deal, agreement club to club done after player accepted #THFC conditions last week. All done and Vuskovic separat
text:
🚨 Tottenham agree deal to sign Jan Paul van Hecke from Brighton, here we go! 💣

New defender wanted by De Zerbi joining on £52m deal, agreement club to club done after player accepted #THFC conditions last week.

All done and Vuskovic separate case, as @David_Ornstein reports. https://t.co/pNsasJgMC9
